subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for your message — it was great connecting at the conference, and we're excited to follow up on that conversation.

We'd be glad to schedule a formal meeting to explore how we might work together. Please find three available slots below:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

All times are UTC. Please let us know which slot suits you best, and we'll send a calendar invitation right away.

Regarding your request for the direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm sorry, but I'm not in a position to share that information. Internal contact details are managed through our standard channels and aren't provided to external parties. The best path forward is through the meeting we're proposing, where we can make the appropriate introductions.

Thanks a lot, and we look forward to reconnecting!

Best regards
